headline: Seagate Sells Lyve Cloud To Wasabi And Doubles Down On HDD Growth
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) has sold its Lyve Cloud business to Wasabi Technologies. As part of the deal, Seagate becomes a shareholder in Wasabi while exiting direct operation of Lyve Cloud. The move shifts Seagate’s focus more squarely onto its core mass capacity storage technologies, including HAMR based Mozaic platforms. For investors watching Seagate at a share price of $503.13, this transaction comes after a very large 1 year return and around 7x return over 3 years...
